title: jwt authentication middleware verification
description: Verify that all requests to POST /api/gemini require a valid Supabase JWT Bearer token. Requests without or with invalid tokens should receive a 401 Unauthorized response.

title: rate limiting enforcement per user
description: Test that the in-memory rate limiter allows up to 20 requests per 60-second window per authenticated user to POST /api/gemini and returns a 429 error when the limit is exceeded.

title: cors enforcement for allowed origins
description: Ensure that OPTIONS and POST requests to /api/gemini with Origin headers from configured allowed origins receive appropriate CORS headers and succeed, while requests from unknown origins receive a 403 error.

title: chapter explanation generation
description: Validate that POST /api/gemini with action 'explain' and required parameters returns a 200 response with markdown explanation text including LaTeX support, and missing action returns 400 error.

title: chapter generation with topic and level
description: Verify that POST /api/gemini with action 'generate-chapter' and valid topic and level returns a 200 response with a JSON chapter object, and missing topic returns 400 error.

title: mind map generation with complexity and detail
description: Test that POST /api/gemini with action 'generate-mindmap' and valid parameters returns a 200 response with JSON mind map data, and invalid complexity returns 400 error.

title: active recall question generation
description: Check that POST /api/gemini with action 'generate-question' and valid conceptTitle and context returns a 200 response with a single question string, and missing conceptTitle returns 400 error.

title: flashcard generation with concepts
description: Confirm that POST /api/gemini with action 'generate-flashcards' and at least one concept returns a 200 response with exactly 5 flashcards in JSON, and empty concepts array returns 400 error.

title: quiz generation with valid count and type
description: Validate that POST /api/gemini with action 'generate-quiz', valid quizType, and count between 1 and 5 returns a 200 response with quiz questions JSON, and invalid count returns 400 error.

title: doubt solver chat functionality
description: Ensure that POST /api/gemini with action 'doubt' and non-empty history returns a 200 response with AI chat reply, and empty history returns 400 error.
